title: Assistant Store Manager - Nerolac Select - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nerolac Select - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
